holdings.infoBox: JMID is an equity ETF with a total of 82 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vertiv Holdings Co stock at 5.29%, Howmet Aerospace at 4.68%, Comfort Systems USA at 3.74%, Ameriprise Financial at 2.62%, and Jabil at 2.36%.

overview.description: The Janus Henderson Mid Cap Growth Alpha ETF (JMID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in mid-cap US stocks exhibiting growth characteristics. JMID was launched on Sep 17, 2024 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
